fields.name: Credit Transfer Register No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the credit-transfer register entry in the Credit Transfer Registers window that the credit transfer entry relates to.

fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Account Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of account that received payment with the credit transfer. If the type is Debitor, then the credit transfer was a refund.

fields.name: Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor, or debitor, who received payment with the credit transfer. If the Account Type field contains Debitor, then the credit transfer was a refund.

fields.name: Applies-to Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry number of the purchase invoice that the vendor ledger entry behind this credit transfer was applied to.

fields.name: Transfer Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the SEPA credit transfer is made. The value is copied from the Posting Date field on the payment line for the purchase invoice.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency that the SEPA credit transfer was made in. To process payments using SEPA Credit Transfer, the currency on the purchase invoice must be EURO.

fields.name: Transfer Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that is paid with the SEPA credit transfer.

fields.name: Transaction ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the credit transfer. The ID is defined from the value in the Identifier field in the Credit Transfer Register field plus the value in the Entry No. field, divided by a slash. For example, DABA00113/3.

fields.name: Canceled
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the exported payment file for this credit transfer register entry has been canceled.

fields.name: Message to Recipient
fields.tooltip: Specifies the text that was entered in the Message to Recipient field on the payment journal line that this credit transfer file was exported from.

fields.name: Recipient IBAN
fields.tooltip: Specifies the IBAN of the creditor bank account that was used on the payment journal line that this credit transfer file was exported from.

fields.name: Recipient Bank Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the creditor bank account that was used on the payment journal line that this credit transfer file was exported from.

fields.name: Recipient Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the recipient of the exported credit transfer, typically a vendor.
